title: 'Emoriy #0567
definition:
Amorite = "a sayer"

 1) one of the peoples of east Canaan and beyond the Jordan, dispossessed
    by the Israelite incursion from Egypt
nasbUsage:
Definition: Amorite = "a sayer"

 1) one of the peoples of east Canaan and beyond the Jordan, dispossessed
    by the Israelite incursion from Egypt

    NASB:  perh. mountain dwellers, a Canaanite tribe
